creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
www/mod_security3 fails to build on a virgin jail on FreeBSD 11.2S on amd64.  

There should be some instructions in UPDATING that advise this requirement and some guidance on its configuration.  After arbitrarily picking devel/git (with default settings) and installing it, I then receive
